nativePolicy: A named section contains a caller-selected native heading, description, optional decorative icon/context, and optional explanatory body; required content rejects booleans, whitespace, empty arrays, and empty fragments.
A primary recovery action is one non-fragment React element and an optional secondary action follows the same rule.
Native recovery elements must be enabled buttons, href-bearing anchors, or action-capable inputs; custom action components retain their semantics.
The layout reflows actions at narrow width without clipping or hiding recovery paths.
